title: The sub SELECT can't identify the outer table
poc: update A set a='a' where A.a not in (select B.a from B where A.b=B.b);
select * from A where A.a not in (select B.a from B where A.b=B.b);
key_bug_features: Sub SELECT fails to reference outer table correctly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE C (x INT, y VARCHAR(20), z DATE);
SELECT * FROM C WHERE C.x NOT IN (SELECT C2.x FROM C AS C2 WHERE C.y IS NOT NULL AND C2.z < '2023-03-01');
